title: equisetum fluviatile f. natans
intro: Equisetum fluviatile f. natans, also known as water horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family, a group of ancient plants often referred to as "living fossils." The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving kidney function, and supporting the immune system. Equisetum fluviatile f. natans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including urinary tract issues and skin problems.
